subject: Confirmation needed TODAY — Seestrasse 12 handover at risk
body:
Artem,

The general contractor is on site and requires your written go-ahead before 4 pm today to proceed with the final handover of Seestrasse 12. If we miss this window, the occupancy permit moves to next month and you trigger the €18,000 delay clause in section 9.4 of the construction contract.

Please confirm by reply or call +41 44 555 0198.

Markus Baum
Total Renovations AG

subject: JV term sheet — revised equity waterfall for Monday call
body:
Hi Artem,

Attached is the revised term sheet for the proposed 50/50 joint venture on the Zug mixed-use portfolio (three assets, total €42M). Our legal team amended the equity waterfall and the exit provisions in sections 6 and 11.

No hard deadline yet, but I'd like us to align on the key points before our Monday partner call so we can move to LOI next week if both sides are comfortable.

Best,
Anna Müller
Alpen Partners AG

subject: Swiss Real Estate Digest — Week 24, 2026
body:
Your weekly roundup of Swiss property market news:

• Zurich office vacancy falls to 2.8% — lowest since 2019
• Basel logistics rents up 4% YoY as e-commerce demand holds
• New SIA 380 energy standards take effect January 2027
• Interview: Family offices diversify into student housing

Have a great weekend,
The Swiss Real Estate News team
